Name: Theme Setup
Notes: Umbrella. Foundational theme work — do first; everything else reads from it. Spec: PORTING.md (Theme Setup).

Name: Design tokens (THM-tokens)
Notes: Color palette, type scale, spacing, layout widths, shadows, motion -> theme.json settings. Build first. Source: _tokens.css (1-104). Spec: PORTING.md THM-tokens.

Name: Core-block base styles (THM-coreblocks)
Notes: Styles for core blocks (paragraph, list, quote, table, details, media-text) -> theme.json styles.blocks.* (Elements tier). Source: _tokens.css (402-632). Spec: PORTING.md THM-coreblocks.

Name: Shared style primitives (STY)
Notes: Theme-owned classes used across many pieces (.card, .card-link, fade-up reveal, button variations, section type, .link-arrow, red rule). Consumers emit the class; never restyle. Build early - dependency of every card/section. Spec: PORTING.md STY.

Name: Berry decor (THM-berry)
Notes: Decorative berry/leaf flourish - theme style + asset, applied on homepage. Not a block/pattern. Source: berry-decor. Spec: PORTING.md THM-berry.

Name: Site header, UGA bar + masthead (PART-header)
Notes: Header template part: UGA global bar + masthead (BLK-brand + BLK-nav mega-menu + core Search). Depends on: BLK-brand, BLK-nav. Source: uga-global-bar, top-nav. Spec: PORTING.md PART-header.

Name: Site footer, CAES + UGA (PART-footer)
Notes: Footer template part: CAES footer (BLK-brand dark + social + 6 link cols) + BLK-uga-footer. Depends on: BLK-brand, BLK-uga-footer. Source: caes-footer, uga-footer. Spec: PORTING.md PART-footer.

Name: Templates
Notes: Umbrella. Block-theme templates. Depend on Theme Setup (chrome/styles) and Program CPT (program templates). Spec: PORTING.md (Templates).

Name: Homepage (TPL-home)
Notes: Landing-page template = Header part + post-content (full-width) + Footer part. Front page = static Page in the normal editor; header/footer locked. Seed with a homepage starter pattern. Source: homepage.html. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-home.

Name: Interior-page template (TPL-interior)
Notes: Shared interior template (Academics landing, Interior page): locked top (breadcrumbs + faded featured image) -> editable post-content -> footer. Interior video = uga-caes/embed. Source: academics.html, interior-page. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-interior.

Name: Interior + sidebar (TPL-interior-sidebar)
Notes: Interior template variant + sibling-page sidebar rail = BLK-nav (section-rail). Depends on: TPL-interior, BLK-nav. Source: interior-page-sidebar. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-interior-sidebar.

Name: Degrees & Programs (TPL-programs-archive)
Notes: Archive template for the program CPT: header + BLK-program-search (faceted search is its own block, not a Query loop). Depends on: Program CPT, BLK-program-search. Source: programs. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-programs-archive.

Name: Program detail (TPL-program-single)
Notes: Single-program template: header pattern (CPT fields) + bands + outcome bars + advisors + scroll-spy subnav (BLK-on-page-nav). Advisors = MOD-personnel cards. Depends on: Program CPT. Source: program-detail. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-program-single.

Name: Directory (TPL-directory)
Notes: Unique template; faceted people list via MOD-personnel (CAES personnel DB). Source: directory. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-directory.

Name: Experts (TPL-experts)
Notes: Unique template; expertise view via MOD-personnel (same DB). Source: experts. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-experts.

Name: Patterns
Notes: Umbrella. Theme patterns of core blocks (+ referenced plugin blocks). Editor-insertable layouts. Spec: PORTING.md (Patterns).

Name: Announcement bar (PAT-announce)
Notes: Static pattern (place in a template part). Dismiss behavior dropped. Source: announcement. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-announce.

Name: Impact mosaic (PAT-mosaic)
Notes: Pattern of core blocks, classes pre-baked. No JS: stretched-link = CSS utility; fade-up = CSS scroll-driven. Source: impact-mosaic. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-mosaic.

Name: Read all about (PAT-read-about)
Notes: Static pattern (full-bleed red strip, oversized italic lockup). Source: read-all-about. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-read-about.

Name: Cards - narrative variant (PAT-cards-narrative)
Notes: Card pattern, narrative visual variation (tag/title/body). Low-structure. Source: phase-cards. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-cards-narrative.

Name: Cards - linked variant (PAT-cards-linked)
Notes: Card pattern, linked visual variation (title/copy/link). Used in program-detail's Paying-for-College band. Source: info-cards. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-cards-linked.

Name: Cards - numbered variant (PAT-cards-numbered)
Notes: Card pattern, numbered visual variation (big number on top + body). CPT-driven version rendered by BLK-program-fields. Source: program-detail (pd3-prep-card). Spec: PORTING.md PAT-cards-numbered.

Name: FAQ (PAT-faq)
Notes: Core details block + pattern (heading + stacked details). Single-open dropped. Source: faq. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-faq.

Name: Closing CTA (PAT-closing-cta)
Notes: Static pattern (Ready to grow your future?): heading + red rule + copy + dual core Buttons. Source: closing-cta. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-closing-cta.

Name: Plugin blocks (new)
Notes: Umbrella. New uga-caes/ server-rendered blocks. Minimal structural CSS; look comes from theme tokens. Spec: PORTING.md (Plugin blocks).

Name: Brand / logo lockup (BLK-brand)
Notes: New uga-caes/brand - CAES lockup. Bundled logo enum (CAES, UGA wordmark; Extension later); variant attr (light/dark/mono) via tokens. Template-part only. Build before PART-header/PART-footer. Source: _shared.jsx. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-brand.

Name: Navigation (BLK-nav)
Notes: New uga-caes/navigation; modes mega-menu (site nav) and section-rail (hierarchy-aware). Server-rendered; mobile collapse built in; template-part only. Source: _shared.jsx (CollapsibleNav). Spec: PORTING.md BLK-nav.

Name: Hero carousel (BLK-hero)
Notes: New uga-caes/hero-carousel - build as a carousel (demo is single hero). Model on caes-hub hero. Photo is background-image. Source: hero. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-hero.

Name: Feature tabs (BLK-feature-tabs)
Notes: New uga-caes/feature-tabs (generic; Student life is one instance). Synced panel swaps on select (view.js). Repeatable items (label/copy/image) as attributes. Source: student-life. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-feature-tabs.

Name: News (BLK-news)
Notes: New uga-caes/news - NOT caes-rss-feed. Pulls from CAES Field Report via a lighter source (pre-baked JSON or similar; TBD). Owns the asymmetric layout. Source: news. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-news.

Name: Stats (BLK-stats)
Notes: New uga-caes/stats - repeatable stat items (serif red number, optional % progress bar, condensed label) in a grid. Parent + uga-caes/stat child (InnerBlocks). Doubles as program outcome bars. Source: design-system (demo-statbars). Spec: PORTING.md BLK-stats.

Name: UGA footer (BLK-uga-footer)
Notes: New uga-caes/uga-footer - reused across UGA/CAES sites (plugin, not per-theme). Migrate the caes-faculty-2023 footer part into the block. Arch-bg SVG. Build before PART-footer. Source: uga-footer. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-uga-footer.

Name: Interior section footer (BLK-section-footer)
Notes: New uga-caes/section-footer resolver block + synced pattern per section. Resolver finds section = top-level ancestor, reads a reference field, renders the pattern. Stores no content. Depends on: TPL-interior. Source: interior-page. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-section-footer.

Name: Scroll-spy subnav (BLK-on-page-nav)
Notes: New uga-caes/on-page-nav - IntersectionObserver + sticky + active-link tracking (view.js). Template-part only. NOT caes-toc. Mobile collapse reuses BLK-nav. Source: program-detail (pd3-subnav). Spec: PORTING.md BLK-on-page-nav.

Name: Program search (BLK-program-search)
Notes: New uga-caes/program-search - faceted directory of the program CPT for the archive. view.js owns interactivity: free-text search, 3 multi-select filter modals (Interest/Type/Department) w/ counts, chips, cards<->table toggle, grouping, Double Dawgs modal. Depends on: Program CPT (CPT-tax, CPT-rel). Source: programs. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-program-search.

Name: Blocks for program details (BLK-program-fields)
Notes: Field blocks exposing program-detail content so each piece is placeable on the single-program template (bindings + small field blocks). Exact blocks TBD once CPT fields are settled. Source: program-detail. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-program-fields.

Name: Scholarships (BLK-scholarships)
Notes: New uga-caes/scholarships - pulls from CAES Scholarship DB (mechanism TBD). Name + open/close dates -> open/closed status + apply link when open. Check current CAES site for prior art. NOT in the demo. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-scholarships.

Name: Expert Resources (BLK-expert-resources)
Notes: New uga-caes/expert-resources - pulls the Expert Resources CPT from CAES Field Report (same source as BLK-news, different CPT/taxonomies; reuse news data mechanism). Filter by taxonomies. NOT in the demo. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-expert-resources.

Name: Experts search (BLK-expert-search)
Notes: New uga-caes/expert-search - faceted search of CAES experts; data in CAES Field Report (same source as BLK-news / BLK-expert-resources). Free-text + filter by expertise. view.js owns interactivity. NOT in the demo. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-expert-search.

Name: Newsletter Archive (BLK-newsletter-archive)
Notes: New uga-caes/newsletter-archive - lists past newsletters, apparently from MailChimp (mechanism TBD). TENTATIVE - needs feedback from Cindy / support team on source, list/campaigns, fields. NOT in the demo. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-newsletter-archive.

Name: Existing block updates
Notes: Umbrella. Already live on other CAES sites - additive changes only; existing attributes/markup must keep rendering. Confirm consumers before editing. Spec: PORTING.md (Existing block updates).

Name: Personnel (directory / experts / cards) (MOD-personnel)
Notes: Reuse/extend uga-caes/personnel: faceted directory + expertise view + profile cards linking to Field Report. Additive only. OPEN: data source (personnel DB vs Field Report import). Source: directory, experts, connect. Spec: PORTING.md MOD-personnel.

Name: Locations / global map (MOD-locations)
Notes: Reuse the uga-caes/locations map family for the Global Programs Map. CPT-driven (MapLibre GL). ISSUE: location CPT is NOT registered in caes-blocks (lives in a separate caes-locations plugin) - decide where the CPT/source comes from. Spec: PORTING.md MOD-locations.

Name: Program CPT
Notes: Umbrella. Register the program CPT in the plugin (theme-agnostic; survives a theme change). Public, archive enabled. Underlies the program templates. Build before the program templates. Spec: PORTING.md (Program CPT).

Name: Register program CPT (CPT-register)
Notes: Register the program post type (public; archive = Degrees & Programs; single = Program detail). Source: detail-hero, program-detail. Spec: PORTING.md CPT-register.

Name: Taxonomies (CPT-tax)
Notes: Interest (primary filter; emoji term-meta), Program type (Major/Minor/Certificate/Graduate), Degree awarded (abbr + full name), Department (URL term-meta), Campus (Athens/Tifton/Griffin). Drives BLK-program-search filters. Spec: PORTING.md CPT-tax.

Name: Meta fields (CPT-meta)
Notes: Summary/lead; Apply/Visit URL (global default + per-program override); How to prepare / Hands-on learning / Career roles (repeatable); Career outcomes (label + % + source); Double Dawgs eligible (bool); FAQ (repeatable Q+A). About/Coursework stays in post content. Spec: PORTING.md CPT-meta.

Name: Relationships (CPT-rel)
Notes: Advisors -> personnel (rendered as MOD-personnel cards linking to Field Report); Double Dawgs pairings -> program (program-to-program to paired master's posts). Spec: PORTING.md CPT-rel.

Name: Program header pattern (CPT-header)
Notes: Pattern assembling header fields (title, type, lead, facts, featured image, CTAs) via core blocks with Block Bindings + small field block(s). Default content of the single-program template (TPL-program-single). Spec: PORTING.md CPT-header.
